prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年西南大学在海南省综合科类最低录取位次分别为约11045名、8392名、6281名、9643名、10765名，呈现先升后降再回升的波动走势；2023年位次冲至 最高点6281名后连续两年后移，2025年基准位次约10765名，近两年累计后移约4484名；该校在海南省综合科类招生计划2021年51人、2022年53人、2023年50人 、2024年53人、2025年52人，2026年计划缩减至40人，较2025年减少12人，缩招幅度约23%，名额明显收紧，竞争压力增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南大学为教育部直属2 11工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第68位稳步提升至2026年第61位，近年排名持续上升，学校综合实力和认可度有所增强；2026年高考周期 内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园外卖配送管理争议，但25条事件中23条为中性，实际负面影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第38位，评价为较热，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；近 五年未见明显投档断档或录取异常记录；第五轮学科评估中，心理学获评A、教育学获评A、马克思主义理论获评A-，师范与农学特色鲜明，对有志于教育类专业 的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；海南省2026年高考报名总人数约78000人，较2025年67408人 增加约10592人，增幅约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧，未出现大幅波动；西南大学位于重庆市，与海南省距离较远 ，属于跨省招生；该校在海南省招生计划占比较小，地域偏好因素对报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10765名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减23%、海南省考 生总数增长约15.7%以及学校排名持续提升等多重因素，虽然，但实际考生规模扩大和名额收紧将推高竞争烈度，预计2026年最低录取位 次约9474名，区间8974–9974名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约9474名，区间8974–9974名。建议位次在区间下限（约8974名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档计算机科学与技术、法学等热门专业；位次在区间中段（约9474名附近）的 考生以二档智能科学与技术、电子信息类等工科专业为主攻方向，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（约9974名）附近的考生以三档荣昌校区专业保底，同时争取二档中位次要求较 低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southwest University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 11045, 8392, 6281, 9643, and 10765, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; the ranking peaked at 6281 in 2023 and then declined for two consecutive years, with the baseline ranking in 2025 being about 10765, a cumulative decline of about 4484 over the past two years; the enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 51 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 53 in 2024, and 52 in 2025, with the 2026 plan reduced to 40, a decrease of 12 from 2025, a reduction of about 23%, significantly tightening quotas and increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a directly under the Ministry of Education 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University ranking has steadily improved from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with rankings continuously rising in recent years, enhancing the school's overall strength and recognition; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus food delivery management disputes, but 23 out of 25 incidents were neutral, with actual negative impact limited; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 38th, rated as relatively hot, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms; no obvious admission gaps or abnormal admission records have been seen in the past five years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, psychology was rated A, education A, and Marxist theory A-, with distinctive features in teacher training and agriculture, strongly attracting candidates interested in education majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Hainan Province college entrance examination is about 78,000, an increase of about 10,592 from 67,408 in 2025, an increase of about 15.7%, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition, with no major fluctuations; Southwest University is located in Chongqing, far from Hainan Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; the school's enrollment plan in Hainan Province accounts for a small proportion, so regional preference factors have limited impact on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the baseline ranking of 10765 in 2025, a significant 23% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, an approximately 15.7% increase in the total number of Hainan candidates, and the continuous improvement in the school's ranking, although, the actual expansion of the candidate pool and tightening of quotas will increase competition intensity. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be about 9474, with a range of 8974–9974.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 9474, range 8974–9974. It is recommended that candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (about 8974) focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Law; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 9474) should target Tier 2 engineering majors like Intelligent Science and Technology and Electronic Information as their main direction, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (about 9974) should use Tier 3 Rongchang Campus majors as a safety net, while also striving for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
